title: Nautilium Spirits
description: Think of it as a mod that increases the usefulness of Nautilus Shells and Gold equipment
body:
# Description
This mod is a remake of figiot0's Nautilium mod(https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nautilium),made by Corrugations.

Think of it as a mod that increases the usefulness of Nautilus Shells and Gold gear

This mod adds a new mineral: the Ancient Shell Block, which generates beneath the surface of the ocean biome.

Mined with a tool above the Diamond Pickaxe, it can drop: Ancient Shell Fragment

One Nautilus shell can be crafted with eight Ancient Shell Fragments: Ancient Nautilium

An important material for cost modules can be fired in a furnace: Nautilium Ingot

It functions similarly to Netherite Ingot

Gold equipment and weapons (tools not included) can be forged into more powerful equipment in a smithing table with Nautilium Ingots and Smithing Templates (Minecraft 1.20 and above).
## What's new
Compared to the original, the following has been added:

1.Added a smithing template for upgrading your Nautilium' equipment, which you can get by fishing, and added a recipe for duplicating a smithing template.

2.Improve the recipe of the original (e.g. nautilium ingots can be fired in a blasting furnace, etc.).

3.More language support.
### Can I add it to a modpack?
Of course you can.
